name: Jack-o-Lantern Cake
recipeIngredient: 18 1/4 ozs reduced fat white cake mix
1 whole ice cream cone, with flat bottom
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the batter using the cake mix according to package directions and bake in a 10-cup fluted tube pan with ridges (to resemble a pumpkin). Cool completely.
2. In a small bowl, measure 1/4 cup frosting and tint with green food coloring.
3. Place the ice cream cone upside down on waxed paper. Frost generously with the green frosting.
4. Refrigerate the frosted cake until ready to frost.
5. In another small bowl, mix the remaining frosting and tint with yellow and red food coloring until an orange color is achieved.
6. Frost the entire cake with the orange frosting.
7. Add a small amount of green food coloring to the orange frosting to create brown for the eyes, mouth, and nose. Use these details to decorate the "pumpkin" face on the cake.
8. Place the frosted ice cream cone in the center hole of the cake to serve as the stem.
